pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v1.3.4; c-PCR-003 Concrete, concrete elements (EN 16757:2023)
lca_tool: GCCA's Industry EPD Tool for Cement and Concrete (V4.2), International version
scope: A1-A3 + A4-A5 + B1-B7 + C1-C4 + D, cradle-to-grave
notes: This PDF's dedicated product-performance pages (20-22, registration EPD-IES-0014769:001) cover only mix 'P252080'. The shared cover page and portfolio summary table (pages 1, 18) list 18 sibling Hanson mixes for the same project (BN402BO31 ... SAP40280, registrations EPD-IES-0014761 through -0014779), each with its own registration number and presumably its own EPD PDF — not treated as multiple products here since only P252080's data pages are in scope for this file/epd_id.
Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 = 127); source gives no A1/A2/A3 split → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.

Unlike other Hanson/EPD-Australasia EPDs in this corpus, B1-B7 are IN SCOPE here with real declared values, not 'ND': page 12's lifecycle table checks (✓) every stage A1-D1, and the scope string on p20 explicitly lists 'B1-B7'. B1 = -2.65 (a recarbonation credit during use — matches the 'CC' extra-indicator row showing -2.65 at B1) and B2-B7 = 0 (declared zero; source states 'no maintenance repair or replacement... required, values are displayed as zero').
GWP-GHG (A1-A3) is printed identical to GWP-tot (A1-A3) = 127 despite non-zero GWP-bio (0.0462) and GWP-luc (0.0292) at A1-A3 — same artifact previously flagged in IES-0029695; not corrected here.

Module D (benefits/loads) = +6.14 kg CO2e, i.e. a net burden rather than the net credit typically seen in comparable EPDs (e.g. HUB-5943 D=-11.7, IES-0029695 D=-18.5); recorded as printed, not adjusted.

No compressive-strength testing standard (e.g. AS 1379) is cited anywhere in the source for this mix — only the bare class '25' (MPa) is given on the product-identification slide (p20) and summary table (p18). AS 3600:2018 appears elsewhere in the doc (p10) only re: Reference Service Life/exposure-class assumptions, not compressive-strength testing.

This is a project-specific EPD (p10) for the 'Hutchinson Builders - Aliro Warehouse' project, single site 'Brisbane' (p20) — narrower site scope than generic multi-plant EPDs elsewhere in this corpus (e.g. IES-0029695's 14 QLD plants).
No separate EN 15804+A1/CML GWP table found in the source → gwp_a1a3_alt omitted.

Independent-verification checkboxes on p24 ('EPD process certification' / 'EPD verification') extracted as empty glyphs, with an unattached stray 'x' character elsewhere on the page — verification.type inferred as process-certification from the explicit 'Process EPD Certified By: Katherine McFeaters, Epsten Group, Inc., A2LA #3142.03' block, same certifying body/accreditation number used in IES-0029695.
Total energy use (single combined kWh figure) not reported — source gives PERT (44.9 MJ) and PENRT (1010 MJ) separately at A1-A3, no combined total; summary_extras.total_energy_use_kwh_a1a3 omitted.
